body_txt: Some characters will grasp the hem of their cape in one hand, then bring that hand to their opposite shoulder, with their elbow and cape now up and in front of their face. The elbow height may vary from just below the character's chin to just below the character's eyes. Character archetypes known to do this include, but are not limited to: Reasons for doing this include, but are not limited to: Types of capes typically used for this effect: Sub-Trope of Cape Swish . Compare Noblewoman's Laugh , which is usually hidden behind a handheld fan or just the hand.
